summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PíoBite cafeteria ordering system prototype. All major features working including welcome screen, login/register, product catalog, cart functionality, order flow with QR code generation, admin dashboard, and responsive navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Some add to cart buttons have overlay interception issues requiring force clicks
Language toggle button sometimes not visible/clickable

passed_tests: Welcome screen with PíoBite branding and navigation buttons
Login screen with role toggle (Alumno/Cliente vs Personal Cafetería)
Login form fields and Google login button
Home screen product catalog with category filtering
Complete order flow (add items → cart → timeslot → confirmation)
QR code generation using react-qr-code library
Order confirmation with code, pickup time, total
Order history with mock orders and status badges
Admin order verification and status change buttons
Bottom navigation on mobile (Home, Favorites, Cart, Orders, Profile)
Responsive design (bottom nav hidden on desktop)
